input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.7.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.7.3
            TITLE: plastic fuel lines between the fuel tank and the engine (supply and return) are prohibited.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.7.3: Plastic fuel lines between the fuel tank and the engine (supply and return) are prohibited.
IC.5.7.3 Plastic fuel lines between the fuel tank and the engine (supply and return) are prohibited.

final_answer: Plastic fuel lines between the fuel tank and the engine (supply and return) are prohibited.
